multiAgent.title: Multi-Agen
multiAgent.subtitle: Deploy alur kerja kolaborasi multi-agen untuk otomasi kompleks
multiAgent.author: Penulis
multiAgent.quickSetupConfirmDesc: Ini akan menambahkan kemampuan berikut ke agen saat ini:
multiAgent.deployModeEnhanceDesc: Tambahkan kemampuan alur kerja ke agen saat ini, memungkinkannya memanggil subagen. Terbaik untuk memulai cepat dan skenario agen tunggal.
multiAgent.deployModeDeployDesc: Buat beberapa subagen independen yang dapat dipanggil oleh agen utama. Terbaik untuk tugas kompleks yang memerlukan peran khusus.
multiAgent.nextStepsDesc: Subagen telah dibuat dan agen utama telah dikonfigurasi. Sekarang Anda dapat:
multiAgent.nextStep1: Kirim tugas ke agen utama, ia akan otomatis memanggil subagen yang tepat
multiAgent.nextStep2: Gunakan perintah /subagents list untuk memeriksa status subagen yang berjalan
multiAgent.nextStep3: Gunakan /subagents send <nomor> <pesan> untuk mengirim pesan ke subagen tertentu
multiAgent.nextStepsTip: 💡 Tips: Agen utama telah belajar cara menggunakan alat sessions_spawn untuk memanggil subagen
multiAgent.collaborationTipDesc: Pilih "Tingkatkan Agen" untuk mengajar agen utama cara memanggil subagen, atau "Deploy Subagen" untuk membuat agen khusus independen. Setelah deployment, agen utama akan otomatis menggunakan sessions_spawn untuk memanggil subagen yang tepat.
multiAgent.promptPlaceholder: Kosongkan untuk menggunakan prompt default (direkomendasikan). Tempel prompt kustom untuk menimpa.

workflow.taskPlaceholder: Jelaskan tugas untuk alur kerja ini...
workflow.deployFirst: Silakan deploy subagen terlebih dahulu menggunakan tombol "Deploy Subagen" sebelum menjalankan alur kerja.

templateManager.title: Pusat Pengetahuan
templateManager.subtitle: Skenario, agen, basis pengetahuan, dan template
templateManager.knowledgeHubDesc: Resep, tips, snippet, dan FAQ untuk menguasai OpenClaw
templateManager.recipesDesc: Panduan konfigurasi langkah demi langkah dan praktik terbaik
templateManager.tipsDesc: Kartu pengetahuan cepat untuk pengguna tingkat lanjut
templateManager.noKnowledgeDesc: Resep, tips, snippet, dan FAQ akan ditambahkan di sini
templateManager.applyAppendConfirm: Konten akan ditambahkan ke {file}. Cadangan akan dibuat. Lanjutkan?
templateManager.applyReplaceConfirm: Konten {file} akan diganti. Cadangan akan dibuat. Lanjutkan?

templateSection.title: Pusat Template
templateSection.subtitle: Jelajahi dan instal template
templateSection.deleteConfirm: Apakah Anda yakin ingin menghapus template ini?

templateSource.title: Sumber Template
templateSource.subtitle: Kelola sumber template dan cache
templateSource.confirmDelete: Apakah Anda yakin ingin menghapus sumber ini?
templateSource.sourceDescBuiltin: Template bawaan, tersedia offline, tidak perlu jaringan
templateSource.sourceDescCdn: Pengiriman cepat via CDN dengan cache otomatis, diperbarui secara berkala
templateSource.sourceDescGithub: Template komunitas dari GitHub, selalu versi terbaru

multiAgentDeploy.title: Deploy Sistem Multi-Agen
multiAgentDeploy.previewDesc: Ini akan membuat beberapa Agen AI independen, masing-masing dengan workspace dan konfigurasi sendiri.
multiAgentDeploy.prefixHint: Agen akan diberi nama: prefix-agentId (mis., my-team-researcher)
multiAgentDeploy.coordinatorUpdatedDesc: SOUL.md telah diperbarui dengan info orkestrasi subagen
multiAgentDeploy.coordinatorNotUpdatedDesc: Silakan konfigurasi agen utama secara manual

scenarioTeamBuilder.cardDesc: Jelaskan skenario Anda, AI otomatis merancang agen dengan SOUL.md & HEARTBEAT.md
scenarioTeamBuilder.title: Pembuat Tim AI
scenarioTeamBuilder.subtitle: Jelaskan skenario, AI menghasilkan tim Anda
scenarioTeamBuilder.descriptionPlaceholder: Jelaskan tujuan dan tanggung jawab tim.
scenarioTeamBuilder.descriptionHint: Tips: Sebutkan domain dan alat untuk hasil lebih baik
scenarioTeamBuilder.example1Desc: Tim fullstack dengan PM, arsitek dan pengembang
scenarioTeamBuilder.example2Desc: Tim konten untuk artikel, media sosial dan SEO
scenarioTeamBuilder.generatingDesc: Merancang peran agen dan file SOUL.md / HEARTBEAT.md
scenarioTeamBuilder.modelRequiredTitle: Pilih model generasi atau konfigurasikan model default terlebih dahulu
scenarioTeamBuilder.modelRequiredDesc: Saat ini Anda menggunakan “Otomatis (model default)”, tetapi OpenClaw belum mengatur agents.defaults.model.primary. Pilih model generasi di bawah, atau atur model default di OpenClaw terlebih dahulu lalu coba lagi.
scenarioTeamBuilder.tpl_softdev_desc: Tim fullstack dengan PM, arsitek, pengembang front/back dan QA. Mencakup analisis kebutuhan, desain, pengembangan, review kode, pengujian, dan pengiriman.
scenarioTeamBuilder.tpl_marketing_desc: Tim pembuatan konten dan pemasaran: artikel SEO, postingan media sosial, newsletter email, dan teks pemasaran. Mengelola strategi, penulisan, penyuntingan, distribusi, dan analitik.
scenarioTeamBuilder.tpl_support_desc: Tim dukungan bertingkat dengan triase, spesialis L1/L2/L3, dan manajemen eskalasi. Fokus pada penyelesaian cepat, pemeliharaan basis pengetahuan, dan peningkatan CSAT.
scenarioTeamBuilder.tpl_research_desc: Tim penelitian akademis atau pasar dengan peneliti utama, pakar domain, analis data, dan peninjau kritis. Melakukan tinjauan literatur, pengumpulan data, analisis, dan penulisan laporan.
scenarioTeamBuilder.tpl_ecommerce_desc: Tim e-commerce untuk daftar produk, strategi harga, inventaris, layanan pelanggan, promosi, dan analitik. Mencakup alur kerja dari pemesanan hingga pengiriman.
scenarioTeamBuilder.tpl_education_desc: Tim konten pendidikan online: kursus, kuis, skrip video, dan materi pembelajaran. Peran meliputi desainer instruksional, pakar materi, penulis, dan peninjau kualitas.
scenarioTeamBuilder.tpl_finance_desc: Tim analisis keuangan untuk riset pasar, pemodelan keuangan, penilaian risiko, analisis portofolio, dan laporan investasi. Menghasilkan laporan riset dan rekomendasi terperinci.
scenarioTeamBuilder.tpl_devops_desc: Tim DevOps/SRE untuk pipeline CI/CD, infrastruktur sebagai kode, pemantauan, respons insiden, dan otomasi deployment. Memastikan keandalan, keamanan, dan skalabilitas.
scenarioTeamBuilder.wzStep1Done: Struktur siap — klik Berikutnya untuk melanjutkan
scenarioTeamBuilder.promptHint: Anda dapat mengedit prompt ini sebelum mengirimkannya ke AI.
scenarioTeamBuilder.genThinkingHint: Ini mungkin membutuhkan 1–10 menit tergantung ukuran tim dan model.
scenarioTeamBuilder.directLlmDesc: Memanggil LLM langsung — tanpa eksekusi alat, respons lebih cepat
scenarioTeamBuilder.agentSessionDesc: Melalui OpenClaw Agent — mendukung konteks yang lebih kaya
scenarioTeamBuilder.minimizeHint: Anda bisa memperkecil jendela ini — pembuatan berlanjut di latar belakang.
scenarioTeamBuilder.bgDoneToast: Pembuatan tim AI selesai — ketuk untuk melihat
scenarioTeamBuilder.timeoutDesc: AI mungkin masih bekerja. Coba lagi — deskripsi lebih pendek atau model yang lebih cepat mungkin membantu.
scenarioTeamBuilder.timeoutTip: Tips: Coba beralih ke model yang lebih cepat
scenarioTeamBuilder.genErrGatewayDesc: Koneksi gateway terputus saat generasi berlangsung. Periksa status gateway dan coba lagi.
scenarioTeamBuilder.genErrGatewayTip: Pastikan gateway berjalan dan sambungkan kembali

multiAgentRoom.pauseMsg: This will immediately stop the agent turn in progress and switch the room to paused.
multiAgentRoom.deleteRoomMsgPrefix: Are you sure you want to delete room «
multiAgentRoom.deleteRoomMsgSuffix: »? This cannot be undone — all messages, members, tasks, and facts will be deleted.
multiAgentRoom.purgeSessionsMsg:
This will delete every member session on the upstream OpenClaw Gateway for this room (effective immediately).

The room’s messages, minutes, agenda, whiteboard, tasks, and other local data are all preserved and remain viewable.

Clean up?
multiAgentRoom.toastNextMeetingDraftPrefilled: Next-meeting draft prefilled from the retro suggestion — tweak it and start
multiAgentRoom.toastCloseoutSuccess: Closeout complete — check minutes, action items, and retro in the Outcome panel on the right
multiAgentRoom.toastCloseoutPartial: Closeout finished with some steps failing — check the result panel for what was generated
multiAgentRoom.toastMemberKickedSuffix: » has left — invite them back from the member list to restore
multiAgentRoom.toastMemberInvitedBackSuffix: » has been invited back and will speak again
multiAgentRoom.toastMemberUnmutedSuffix: » is unmuted and will speak again next turn
multiAgentRoom.toastMemberMutedSuffix: » is muted — speaking is skipped in this room (still in the meeting)
multiAgentRoom.removeMemberCascadeMessage: Hapus juga semua pesan yang dikirim oleh anggota ini? Pilih "Batal" untuk mempertahankan riwayat pesan.
multiAgentRoom.toastMemberRemovedCascade: telah dihapus secara permanen beserta semua pesannya
multiAgentRoom.toastMemberRemovedKeep: telah dihapus secara permanen — pesannya dipertahankan
multiAgentRoom.toastMemberAdded: Anggota baru ditambahkan — akan bergabung di ronde berikutnya
multiAgentRoom.hintCloseout: Closeout is generating minutes, action items, playbooks, and retro
multiAgentRoom.hintClosed: Meeting is over — you can still view and clean up AI sessions
multiAgentRoom.hintPaused: Discussion paused — resume or adjust the next step
multiAgentRoom.hintDraft: Drop an opener or click Continue to officially start the session
multiAgentRoom.stateDraft: Room hasn’t fully warmed up yet
multiAgentRoom.stateBiddingDetail: Semua agen sedang menilai keinginan bicara mereka; yang tertinggi akan berbicara berikutnya
multiAgentRoom.stateIdleDetail: Klik ▶ Lanjutkan atau kirim pesan untuk memulai putaran berikutnya
multiAgentRoom.compactionWillRetry: · Will retry this turn with the compressed context
multiAgentRoom.budgetOver: Budget is about to exceed the cap
multiAgentRoom.helpSlashFork: — fork a new room from here
multiAgentRoom.busRemoveRuleMsg: This cross-room delivery rule will be removed. Continue?
multiAgentRoom.busSaveMsgActivePrefix: Saving will forward this room’s closeout output to the target room on future events. Active rules:
multiAgentRoom.busSaveMsgInactive: Saving will disable cross-room delivery for this room. Continue?
multiAgentRoom.rolesDeleteMsgSuffix: » will be deleted. Past member instances in rooms are preserved. Continue?
multiAgentRoom.settingsOverviewHint: Check the overall status first, then open the category you want to refine. Interactions stay consistent with the Room tuning wizard.
multiAgentRoom.settingsTuningDesc: Apply preset styles (casual / deep work / debate / brainstorm), or fine-tune speaking thresholds, memory compression, and persona prompts.
multiAgentRoom.auxCardSummary: Manage room-level Aux overrides and the workspace-wide default value.
multiAgentRoom.busCardSummary: Configure delivery rules, target rooms, and title templates for sending closeout results to other rooms.
multiAgentRoom.rolesCardSummary: Maintain reusable role templates — configure prompts, default model, Agent binding, and interaction preferences.
multiAgentRoom.auxDetailSubtitle: Manage the current-room Aux override and the global default
multiAgentRoom.auxIntroBody: is used for internal LLM calls in this room: competitive-speaking scoring, meeting minutes, TODO extraction, decision summaries, absence digests, etc. These calls are not quality-sensitive — a cheap model (gpt-4o-mini / gpt-5-mini / haiku) is recommended to save cost.
multiAgentRoom.auxIntroFooter: Main dialogue keeps using each member's own model and is not affected.
multiAgentRoom.auxStep1Hint: Highest priority. Only affects the current room. Leave empty to follow the next level.
multiAgentRoom.auxStep2Hint: Applied to rooms without their own override. Leave empty to fall back to members’ main models.
multiAgentRoom.auxStep3Hint: Fallback chain: room → global default → member main model. Below is the value actually used right now.
multiAgentRoom.auxEffectiveFallback: Follow members' main model (no cheap model configured)
multiAgentRoom.busDetailSubtitle: Configure rules for delivering closeout results to other rooms
multiAgentRoom.busIntroBody: Automatically forwards this room’s closeout output to another room as a new agenda item or task.
multiAgentRoom.busStep1Hint: Each rule describes one cross-room delivery: trigger event, target room, and agenda title template.
multiAgentRoom.busStep2Hint: These guardrails apply automatically — no extra configuration required. Just know what they do.
multiAgentRoom.busGuardrail1: Only rooms owned by the same user can deliver to each other; cross-owner is rejected.
multiAgentRoom.busGuardrail2: Direct A→B + B→A loops are avoided by default to prevent cascading triggers.
multiAgentRoom.busGuardrail3: Duplicate closeouts are deduplicated idempotently via a bundle marker — no duplicate agenda items.
multiAgentRoom.busStep3Hint: Once saved, new rules take effect on the next closeout.done event in the order shown above.
multiAgentRoom.busStep3HasChanges: You have unsaved changes. Save to apply.
multiAgentRoom.busStep3NoChanges: Rules are in sync with the server.
multiAgentRoom.busNoRulesHint: No delivery rules yet. Add a closeout → agenda automation.
multiAgentRoom.busTitleTemplatePlaceholder: Agenda title template, e.g. Retro source output: {{sourceRoomTitle}}
multiAgentRoom.busNotePlaceholder: Extra note (appended to the target agenda description)
multiAgentRoom.rolesDetailSubtitle: Maintain reusable role templates and behavior preferences
multiAgentRoom.rolesBrowseHint: Browse existing roles first. The editor on the right opens only after you pick a role or click "New role".
multiAgentRoom.rolesEmptyList: No roles in the library yet
multiAgentRoom.rolesPickFirstTitle: Pick a role to start editing
multiAgentRoom.rolesPickFirstHint: Or click "New role" above to create a new meeting-role template.
multiAgentRoom.rolesEditorDescEdit: Adjust metadata, prompt, and interaction preferences. Saving updates the template available for later rooms.
multiAgentRoom.rolesEditorDescNew: Create a reusable role template for quick role picking and batch reuse in meetings.
multiAgentRoom.rolesSectionBasicHint: Define the role’s card name, displayed identity, and sort order.
multiAgentRoom.rolesSectionPromptHint: Control the default model, role stance, Agent binding, and prompt style.
multiAgentRoom.rolesFieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Where this role fits and the angle it speaks from
multiAgentRoom.rolesFieldStylePromptPlaceholder: Style prompt (stylePrompt): constrains tone, style, and structure
multiAgentRoom.rolesSectionInteractionHint: Define which targets and topics the role prefers to collaborate with, challenge, or wrap up.
multiAgentRoom.rolesFieldClosureStylePlaceholder: closureStyle (e.g. summarize decisions / list action items)
multiAgentRoom.rolesFieldNotesPlaceholder: interaction notes: describe the role’s preferred interaction partners and collaboration / opposition style
multiAgentRoom.rolesFooterNote: Note: the role library is best for maintaining prompts, stance, agent binding, and scheduling preferences. Tool availability is still controlled by the underlying Agent / OpenClaw runtime — not restricted at the AI Meeting layer.
multiAgentRoom.heroDescLine1: AgentRoom is a native multi-agent meeting room. Put N AIs in one room,
multiAgentRoom.heroDescLine2: let them collaborate in real time, while you can jump in, rewrite replies, or play one of the roles yourself.
